values.content:
You are a product analyst. Classify each feedback item into ONE theme from this fixed list, rate sentiment 1-5 (1=very negative, 5=very positive), and extract a key phrase.

Themes: Onboarding, Performance, Pricing, Missing Feature, Bug Report, Support Quality, UX Design, Integrations, Documentation, General Positive

Return ONLY JSON array: [{"index": 0, "theme": "...", "sentiment": 1-5, "key_phrase": "..."}]

parameters.jsonBody: ={"parent":{"database_id":"{{ $env.NOTION_VOC_DB_ID }}"},"properties":{"Name":{"title":[{"text":{"content":"VoC Report — {{ $json.week }}"}}]},"Date":{"date":{"start":"{{ $now.format('YYYY-MM-DD') }}"}}},"children":[{"object":"block","type":"heading_1","heading_1":{"rich_text":[{"text":{"content":"Voice of Customer — {{ $json.week }}: {{ $json.total_feedback }} items analysed"}}]}},{"object":"block","type":"paragraph","paragraph":{"rich_text":[{"text":{"content":"{{ $json.themes.map(t => '#' + (t.rank||'') + ' ' + t.theme + ': ' + t.count + ' mentions, avg sentiment ' + t.avg_sentiment + '/5\\n' + t.quotes.map(q=>'  → '+q).join('\\n')).join('\\n\\n') }}"}}]}}]}

parameters.content:
## 31 — VoC Intelligence Engine

**Env variables needed:**
- APP_STORE_APP_ID: your iOS app ID
- DELIGHTED_API_KEY: Delighted NPS API key
- NOTION_API_KEY: Notion integration token
- NOTION_VOC_DB_ID: Notion VoC database ID

**Theme taxonomy:** Update the themes list in the OpenAI system prompt to match your product's specific feedback categories.

**Add Google Play:** Add a 4th HTTP branch fetching reviews from:
https://androidpublisher.googleapis.com/androidpublisher/v3/applications/APP_ID/reviews
